completion_summary: Implemented and full-release-gate validated a professional-candidate stability-aware LLE runtime provider that couples a strict two-liquid/no-drive gate, activity-corrected multistage extraction and wash, continuous-phase directional entrainment, explicit convergence failures, extreme-K bounds, component closure, analytic identities, deterministic domain sweeps, a WF-00 contract, and the first vNext runtime-replacement proposal for the former extraction/stability provider pair; v0.3 runtime, tasks, World Law, scoring, and frozen benchmark evidence remain unchanged.
notes: No edits to existing equilibrium/extraction/flash implementations, runtime routes, tasks.py, World Law, scoring, golden trajectories, benchmark evidence, or maturity audit. WF-110 alone integrates the candidate and removes old providers after route and benchmark refreeze.
scope: Couple explicit liquid-phase stability classification with activity-corrected multistage extraction/wash, phase-status policy, entrainment, recovery and material closure; deliver a WF-00 provider contract and the first vNext runtime-replacement proposal for the current extraction/stability pair.
